LanguageData.AerialVehicle.description: An aerial vehicle capable of flight on the world map.
LanguageData.AerialVehicle.label: aerial vehicle
LanguageData.CrashedShipSite.description: A recently downed aerial vehicle with possible survivors.
LanguageData.CrashedShipSite.label: crash site
LanguageData.DebugSettlement.label: original location
LanguageData.StashedVehicle.label: stashed vehicle
LanguageData.VehicleCaravan.description: A group of traveling people with vehicles.
